issue: RIG V10: Git agent, CLI, MCP readiness design
v10_product_promise: A product-grade, deterministic repository surface for SpeakEasy Barber Lounge that supports human and agent workflows through documented CLI operations, proof artifacts, and explicit governance boundaries.

mcp_surface.reason: No MCP server/client implementation files are currently present. Add MCP only after product tools/resources/prompts and auth boundary owners are approved.

required_future_contract.auth_boundary: public-read-only by default; private booking/customer data requires explicit human-approved auth design

model_routing_expectations.planner: high-reasoning model for decomposition and risk calls
model_routing_expectations.fixer: standard coding model for scoped edits
model_routing_expectations.qa: fast model for repeatable command execution and proof capture

quality_gates: gate_4_proof: update proof/looper-v10-cockpit artifact with blockers and command results

required_behavior: refresh proof artifact with timestamped blockers and readiness deltas
triage retryable planner/automation failures without deleting prior proof
